talk_metadata.talk_title: Implementation planning for lung cancer screening in HIV care settings
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "I want to make sure that the work that I do or the work that comes out of my lab has actual impact within the community."
Speaker said: "We observed that 75% were diagnosed at metastatic stage."

key_data_gaps: No outcome data on implementation effectiveness presented
No quantitative metrics of screening uptake yet

unresolved_questions: How will the planned implementation strategies be evaluated for effectiveness?
What are the timelines for obtaining real-world screening uptake data?

talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: Rutgers Robert Wood Johnson Medical School
talk_metadata.talk_title: Participatory engaged approaches to tailor colorectal cancer screening for patients with diabetes
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We identified the top three that they really wanted to dig into."
Speaker said: "We saw that controlled patients, not well‑controlled, were actually the largest population of patients with diabetes who were unscreened."

key_data_gaps: No final effectiveness outcomes reported (pilot still ongoing)

unresolved_questions: What were the quantitative changes in screening rates after the toolkit implementation?
How will turnover of clinic staff be mitigated in future implementations?

talk_metadata.talk_title: Sustaining and scaling HPV vaccination implementation strategies in safety‑net settings
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "Equity should be integrated into intervention development at all stages."

Speaker said: "We saw a dip in 11 to 12 year olds, and we are currently trying to assess if that is because they've replaced the 11 to 12‑year‑old vaccinations with the nine to 10‑year‑old vaccinations."

key_data_gaps: No long‑term follow‑up beyond 18 months for sustainability
Limited data on HPV uptake in the 11‑12 year age group

unresolved_questions: What specific factors drove the observed dip in 11‑12 year‑old vaccination rates?
How can the implementation toolkit be adapted for other FQHC systems with different resource constraints?
